    71.Narrator: *Your stomach churns around and around. The bile within is unsettled. Each moment brings a new surge.*note: The Dark Urge is trying to sleep or rest, wakes up and starts pacing around a quiet part of the camp.ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_KillIsobel

                      51.SoundsLikeDUButler: You know there is murder slumbering within you, and in controlling it, it has grown insatiable. Your Dark Urge will have death tonight, one way or another.

                      Metadata

                    50.DU: I didn't lay a finger on Isobel. I can control myself.ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_KillIsobel

                        104.SoundsLikeDUButler: Then it should be a trifling matter to kill this one!

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7330d370-8e4e-587f-9afb-eab2c0955359Speaker: 0 (SoundsLikeDUButler)Text Handle: ha82f62a3g039cg445cg988agdabc252f1650Text UUID: 77ce356f-d5bc-45a5-8b24-7f796e255862Timeline Phase Index: 147Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7330d370-8e4e-587f-9afb-eab2c0955359Timeline Phase Duration: 3.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 817dd5ba-56aa-408c-847c-ecc8a8aef87fTimeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\817dd5ba-56aa-408c-847c-ecc8a8aef87f.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: 10e2a637-e2a5-0c09-60ed-78f6cf6b687fTimeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_UI_Model_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_GradientMap_CustomMask_3Layers_Fake_PostProcess_DarkUrge_Eye_Animated_Vignette_01Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Generated\Public\Shared\Assets\Effects\Models\Static\VFX_Static_FakePostProcess_01.GR2Timeline Material 2 Group ID: 5f26f1b5-02b6-4ab8-8ac5-7766cd90b736Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\5f26f1b5-02b6-4ab8-8ac5-7766cd90b736.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: 203d87ff-aa90-d14e-2384-bb197314640fTimeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_UI_Model_AlphaBlend_Unlit_Emissive_GradientMap_CustomMask_3Layers_Fake_PostProcess_DarkUrge_Animated_Vignette_01Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Generated\Public\Shared\Assets\Effects\Models\Static\VFX_Static_FakePostProcess_01.GR2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1063.94s-1073.89s] | @ 1063.94s | speaker 2 | Fear (16)

                          234.SoundsLikeDUButler: He adores you so blindly. Like a pup. Don't you find it sickening?WyllKarlachAstarionLae'zelGale+1 more806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim

                          Flags and Tags

                          ruletagtype rule
                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                          checktype Local
                          • 806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim {b85e15cf-011a-04f3-cee6-89a3c85aa623} = True

                          Text

                          Variant 1

                          combine=0
                          • Wyll
                          He adores you so blindly. Like a pup. Don't you find it sickening?
                          heb91463eg2bedg4091g934fg747cbe501d3e | 068d3d46-4e99-4ea4-b074-80e37b96260b | stub

                          Variant 2

                          combine=0
                          • Karlach
                          She's as good as dead anyway. She won't be saved by the power of love. Not yours.
                          h925af0eegb3deg4c4bg823fgfed95bd1ef5e | 630fd3b0-2bbe-43fb-a070-4b5ada55b145 | stub

                          Variant 3

                          combine=0
                          • Astarion
                          You like him for more than his looks, but he will never believe that. Why not make him a pretty corpse?
                          h700432bbg3169g492cgb69cgb65f175aedbd | aa1d3df8-4722-46ab-a16e-7369967c3cd1 | stub

                          Variant 4

                          combine=0
                          • Lae'zel
                          She is only using you. Don't you know that?
                          hdc474ac2g0311g4ae6gb34cgebf25d528c1b | 8478ef71-eb57-4608-b7b6-59489e9068e4 | stub

                          Variant 5

                          combine=0
                          • Gale
                          He would forget his god for you. But you won't for him, of that I know.
                          h3155489agd78ag41a4ga22bg4845138c8a24 | 5eae9566-7d5e-481d-99e6-f49d52fc0c26 | stub

                          Variant 6

                          combine=0
                          • Shadowheart
                          She was starting to trust you. The only one she ever has. Pity it's coming to an end.
                          h274f5422g17b3g4940g8842g36fb86b43409 | d4a9a2e9-5375-4237-b4ac-c579f26184dd | stub

                            68.DU: He must live - I haven't yet told him how I truly feel about him.MaleFemale

                            Flags and Tags

                            ruletagtype rule

                            • Female {3806477c-65a7-4100-9f92-be4c12c4fa4f}

                            Text

                            Variant 1

                            combine=0

                                                        100.Player: I love feeling you close. But are you sure -note: [greg] The Companion awakens from their sleep.Choose an appropraite start sleeping position for character, sit up during lineWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim

                                                        • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}

                                                        checktype Local
                                                        • 806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim {b85e15cf-011a-04f3-cee6-89a3c85aa623} = True

                                                        Text

                                                        Variant 1

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Wyll
                                                        I love feeling you close. But are you sure -
                                                        h5b88f793ge264g4313ga936g963184eaeb1e | 73ffce7e-2232-4b68-8552-8138c1098b87 | stub

                                                        Variant 2

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Karlach
                                                        Mm - hello, love. Did you have a bad dream?
                                                        h109f706dg36cfg4089ga269gbe33b34cc981 | ec638b73-0d9c-4c77-a07e-9b5916f50ba9 | stub

                                                        Variant 3

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Gale
                                                        Mmm. A pleasant dream gives way to an even more pleasant reality.
                                                        h27bb2cd4gc664g4af8ga7a8g6c8279fb296a | 3776782a-a1af-4d29-bedd-f7bc1f49f15c | stub

                                                        Variant 4

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Astarion
                                                        Well, hello. Looking for a cuddle?
                                                        hee8b646bgc6f2g4218g9053ga8084ed62b0c | 74b143b1-4f0f-4586-aa76-9defe49bbcfe | stub

                                                        Variant 5

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Lae'zel
                                                        Your breath and body - the heat of you. You know what it does to me.
                                                        h2627e497gfc44g4b70ga05eg007b8306b2d6 | 83e83c18-e85a-48ea-817f-365b6fbf2802 | stub

                                                        Variant 6

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Shadowheart
                                                        Hmm...? Oh, has the mood struck you, love? I suppose we could try, if you think the others won't stir...
                                                        he3104688g5509g4d90g832eg2bd8b5e6ce34 | 04a4319c-29ad-43d8-bf39-60bab2da5def | stub

                                                          98.Player: Gods, what's the matter? You look like you've seen a gravehound's ghost.note: [Greg] DU has a woozy expression.Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                          Text

                                                          Variant 1

                                                          combine=0
                                                          • Wyll
                                                          Gods, what's the matter? You look like you've seen a gravehound's ghost.
                                                          h4e8c0a52g664eg4051g8a99g365810c2db23 | e8f39f26-fbfe-4c51-9300-7d0c1d8286a2 | stub

                                                          Variant 2

                                                          combine=0
                                                          • Karlach
                                                          You look like hell. What's wrong?
                                                          h9eb9adb9gc7ecg4d9dga5f0gac175dd56343 | f2625929-2511-420d-987d-5023e057d31d | stub

                                                          Variant 3

                                                          combine=0
                                                          • Gale
                                                          Wait. I'm not sure I like that look in your eyes. What's wrong?
                                                          h75f0050eg3307g4f2fgb408g2643bc33de52 | d54ce1a6-6a6c-400b-b743-f1bf9f0c0ce9 | stub

                                                          Variant 4

                                                          combine=0
                                                          • Astarion
                                                          Although you don't look entirely... yourself. What's going on in that head of yours?
                                                          h80ea0477ga705g451fgb621g8eb86180165b | ce691e55-63a1-4303-ab50-cec12eac5d68 | stub

                                                          Variant 5

                                                          combine=0
                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                          Bah - you look sick as a cadaver. What's come over you?
                                                          h2fad721fg5529g4e40g87ebg6f7e2d5850c0 | f146d288-f173-4ecb-86f0-319a8dff47a5 | stub

                                                          Variant 6

                                                          combine=0
                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                          Hold on, you look like you've had a shock - is something the matter?
                                                          h39974a26g8bbag4a60gb189gb1a2956def16 | ff37f631-08b5-4dad-8718-27239944eabb | stub

                                                          • +
                                                            69.DU: A wicked wretch came to me in the night, and told me something horrible.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4f39cc64-b601-dc08-445e-8b587c184ebcSpeaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h6e9562fcg4fd2g4ee9g87c0geedbfbaa3a8fText UUID: ccf327c9-249f-41ab-afbe-02a9eb91b382Show Once: True
                                                            • +
                                                              94.Player: Hells. What wretch? What did it say?note: [Greg] DU has a woozy expression.Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                              • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                              • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                              • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                              • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                              • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                              • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                              Text

                                                              Variant 1

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Wyll
                                                              Hells. What wretch? What did it say?
                                                              hf60e25b2gd3b0g46fbg9274g80053493409a | 944b7793-5175-41b9-9799-dae3631a8016 | stub

                                                              Variant 2

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Karlach
                                                              I'll kill the bastard. What happened?
                                                              h85198ef6gb020g44c5gbe5eg968c670480b4 | 95428984-7b0c-4c97-ade4-5eec8f5ec4c8 | stub

                                                              Variant 3

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Gale
                                                              And you're quite sure it wasn't a dream? Cheese partaken at a late hour can wreak havoc on the unconscious... Go on, tell me about it.
                                                              h210b8a21gd492g4a50g9651g3d0d21782a67 | df51c224-fbd7-4c7c-9c9c-aed9622565d6 | stub

                                                              Variant 4

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Astarion
                                                              More horrible than our day-to-day lives? Well this I have to hear.
                                                              he6f5e0ffg4213g4162gafd7g940f8623cf80 | c1803d04-c93e-44f4-8bfd-f2f5ceb3fbea | stub

                                                              Variant 5

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                              Tell me.
                                                              hf6cb85c8g6fcdg44c8g9b40g401b2fbc4e84 | f027d232-285f-4bbf-8293-7603dc2c6df4 | stub

                                                              Variant 6

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                              Well, could be worse... It could have done something horrible. What did it say?

                                                                    Variant 2

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Karlach
                                                                    Driving you that mad, am I?
                                                                    h45fd999ag280dg44c2ga376g506701c4c2a7 | d30a49f2-ca83-40c9-883f-3ae6645e632f | stub

                                                                    Variant 3

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Gale
                                                                    Why, I've shared my heart with you. And I'd truly rather you didn't skewer it.
                                                                    h7f43a21fg472fg42b2g93a1g8b9c1618ef88 | 05b63b45-28eb-4907-aeb9-9118a349a77d | stub

                                                                    Variant 4

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Astarion
                                                                    I'd rather be the only dark power inside your body, if it's all the same to you.
                                                                    h29b490a7g7ac2g4c9bg8c17gbcfd37188da2 | 9c296a47-dc01-4369-851d-c77c3398c1c6 | stub

                                                                    Variant 5

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Lae'zel
                                                                    Raise a hand against me, and even a lover would not live to speak the tale.
                                                                    hbb13a28ag3ffbg4d5fgae94g6638e6a8e84d | 701d0fc7-0533-4068-aee8-448f6131a051 | stub

                                                                    Variant 6

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Shadowheart
                                                                    Hells, what I wouldn't give for a boring lover sometimes.
                                                                    h7c61325cg44e8g43ddg8e6dg47df2d752bb3 | 54ebad1d-5c1e-442f-aaa7-c52d4860fd32 | stub

                                                                    • +
                                                                      81.Player: You're not in your right mind. There are healers in the city, clerics who can help.note: [Greg]Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                                      ruletagtype rule
                                                                      • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                      • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                      • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                      • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                      • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                      Text

                                                                      Variant 1

                                                                      combine=0
                                                                      • Wyll
                                                                      You're not in your right mind. There are healers in the city, clerics who can help.
                                                                      hc3a33915g359bg42a6gaa92g9a37e9115016 | 1ba1db48-6eb6-443c-8c64-992eec2174cf | stub

                                                                      Variant 2

                                                                      combine=0
                                                                      • Karlach
                                                                      Look - we'll do whatever it takes to keep us both safe. I promise.
                                                                      hc2abe830g0d90g45fbgb8ceg4668f6988186 | dc07daf6-ab54-4141-95b5-3eee39c52541 | stub

                                                                      Variant 3

                                                                      combine=0
                                                                      • Gale
                                                                      Dangerous secrets are best shared with those who depend on you. I should know.
                                                                      h3c772966g4a92g4f21g9ea6g098c1845d27d | ddc40f41-d31e-40a8-9eef-fb135f2280a1 | stub

                                                                      Variant 4

                                                                      combine=0
                                                                      • Astarion
                                                                      You're welcome to try and kill me, of course, but I don't die easily these days.
                                                                      ha9a0ecf7gc1dbg41c8g8188g2a1c3cbcf7fd | 3556abbd-c1e3-4a3e-9010-1b8e159cafa5 | stub

                                                                      Variant 5

                                                                      combine=0
                                                                      • Lae'zel
                                                                      You're suffering - I see it. Perhaps the shadow curse still lingers? No. You are more than cursed. You are taken.
                                                                      h53768830g4ae6g4fe5gaf78g510953824ea8 | 17b1e2b2-b19e-4b19-b4df-5198630093b3 | stub

                                                                      Variant 6

                                                                      combine=0
                                                                      • Shadowheart
                                                                      How long has this been going on? Do I even want to know the answer to that...?
                                                                      hf40a406eg427dg45b6ga40bg3389e001e572 | 4f87934e-b0ba-419e-8af9-a1edff94a199 | stub

                                                                      • +
                                                                        77.Player: You should've told me sooner. We could've figured something out.note: [Greg] .Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                                        ruletagtype rule
                                                                        • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                        • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                        • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                        • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                        • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                        Text

                                                                        Variant 1

                                                                        combine=0
                                                                        • Wyll
                                                                        You should've told me sooner. We could've figured something out.
                                                                        hbb2e3bbdg439eg4bbbg9ac1ge610965387a0 | c159953e-3f99-4cfa-ae2e-40dbcf571f15 | stub

                                                                        Variant 2

                                                                        combine=0
                                                                        • Karlach
                                                                        But why didn't you tell me before? I could've helped you sooner - like you've helped me.
                                                                        h27aeb6e5gdf50g4b1cga0d0gd3f6ce8e5b40 | 7199ea5a-0a6a-4b50-a64e-c2081de0c3b7 | stub

                                                                        Variant 3

                                                                        combine=0
                                                                        • Gale
                                                                        We're in this together, theoretically. You should have confided in me sooner.
                                                                        h54f1a175gd0d9g4a9bg9a25g4156a753573d | 1557197b-548b-4ca7-9af7-25ce68201e7c | stub

                                                                        Variant 4

                                                                        combine=0
                                                                        • Astarion
                                                                        You could have talked to me before things got murderously bad, you know. We are technically in this together.
                                                                        hb7c707f6g5be9g4c69g8aa5gb82b75b7a6ab | d7189f2c-338f-431f-a256-82f2b03f0a6d | stub

                                                                        Variant 5

                                                                        combine=0
                                                                        • Lae'zel
                                                                        This is no new affliction, is it? To think you'd keep this from me.
                                                                        h5bfc6c2bg15f5g4f89gb4b4gcd57cc44d537 | 70685156-b2bd-4596-89ad-c53698dbff1a | stub

                                                                        Variant 6

                                                                        combine=0
                                                                        • Shadowheart
                                                                        I'd rather you'd trusted me sooner, given all we've been through already.
                                                                        h3b75e5dbg88bdg4f7eg82edg93fe71fbbcbb | 00204ef4-0049-4d19-b1bc-d3471bdc6303 | stub

                                                                        • +
                                                                          232.Player: This is what happened with Alfira, isn't it? By Balduran's helm, if only I'd known.note: [Greg] .Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more!ORI_DarkUrge_MurderOfAlfira_AlternativeORI_DarkUrge_State_SuspectedAlfiraMurder

                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                          ruletagtype rule
                                                                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                                                          checktype Global
                                                                          • ORI_DarkUrge_MurderOfAlfira_Alternative {1904d9ba-7d71-4f02-8c3c-cd57d7e0606d} = False
                                                                          • ORI_DarkUrge_State_SuspectedAlfiraMurder {7ef11fbd-70d6-74d7-2679-8d062cd9c3e8} = True

                                                                          Text

                                                                          Variant 1

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Wyll
                                                                          This is what happened with Alfira, isn't it? By Balduran's helm, if only I'd known.
                                                                          h8ce47ed2gf0dag4ee2ga4a6ge6ddd6c030a5 | 2a98cb12-77cb-4125-a17b-f744217a6ff1 | stub

                                                                          Variant 2

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Karlach
                                                                          Maybe then... Alfira would still be here? But - we're here now. And we're going to fix this.
                                                                          h78e8e7afg31dag44f1gad6dgb9f16747489f | 000ba9b9-dd4e-4af6-86ab-cf1b608e56d2 | stub

                                                                          Variant 3

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Gale
                                                                          This certainly casts the butchery of Alfira in a new light... but we'll find a solution for this, you and I.
                                                                          hcbadfa1dg207ag446eg9d02g4624ffb9cee3 | deeb4aa3-a4e1-4b85-b089-6e7fce8fa23e | stub

                                                                          Variant 4

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Astarion
                                                                          It certainly puts the death of dear, sweet Alfira into some perspective.
                                                                          h4a012bf5g5032g44f5g8ac9g5ea99e1632bf | c5e97370-7fd8-481d-99ca-5f56c0a35734 | stub

                                                                          Variant 5

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                                          Chk - it might have been your hand that struck Alfira. But it was this madness that guided it.
                                                                          h5abda0a3g6b45g4c9eg8630g998200aca6c6 | c0f8ad53-b06d-4894-9c90-c2b497883d30 | stub

                                                                          Variant 6

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                                          Suddenly Alfira's death makes a lot more sense... We're going to figure this out, understand? We have to.
                                                                          h4c1e11b5g7a75g4914gab52ge139656b387c | a91b6b4b-4557-4719-8837-f4302991f3d7 | stub

                                                                                  186.Player: Hey. Hey! Stay with me!note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleLae'zelShadowheart+1 more

                                                                                  • Wyll

                                                                                  Variant 2

                                                                                  • Karlach

                                                                                  • Gale

                                                                                  • +
                                                                                    168.DU: I will scoop out those watchful eyes and toss them to the dogs.

                                                                                    Metadata

                                                                                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: b6ed9948-26c0-b19a-7658-def625e29f71Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: hcdf187dcg5b0eg450fgbcf5g11b5821f3378Text UUID: 7499b354-ebba-4c49-a551-4ff2d03316b0Show Once: True
                                                                                    • +
                                                                                      216.Player: Whatever fiend's got hold of you, it's made a battlefield of your mind.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                      Flags and Tags

                                                                                      ruletagtype rule
                                                                                      • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                      • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                      • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                      • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                      • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                      • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                      Text

                                                                                      Variant 1

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Wyll
                                                                                      Whatever fiend's got hold of you, it's made a battlefield of your mind.
                                                                                      h6351907dg5f5fg4093g97e0g457df19f2908 | 62ac7671-2906-4931-a010-db46eec2ce57 | stub

                                                                                      Variant 2

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Karlach
                                                                                      Whatever's happening to you will pass. It doesn't scare me. Stay with me.
                                                                                      hf6056bf5gf670g4deaga92fg6edbdd28b950 | 413d66ec-f9a3-4171-8d05-120ee96ab00f | stub

                                                                                      Variant 3

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Gale
                                                                                      Spare me the gory details - I know you're still in there. Hold fast.
                                                                                      h5631bb59g5eeeg4129g819bg0c846ffa1b81 | 85b26f3a-286f-48e8-8fbd-344dab46e1e2 | stub

                                                                                      Variant 4

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Astarion
                                                                                      You're cute, you know. In another life we might have been friends.
                                                                                      h7817e1c2ge1a3g43e0g8fcbg2435b4acdea7 | 4ca7b916-9a85-42b3-88b4-be77abc16f01 | stub

                                                                                      Variant 5

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Lae'zel
                                                                                      Deliciously feral. Now hold that Urge and save it for the battlefield.
                                                                                      h18217318g6da8g4b83g9dedg3e086ca659e4 | 45a0b767-35ba-4085-a0b0-fe7e36fd3004 | stub

                                                                                      Variant 6

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Shadowheart
                                                                                      If you've energy to flirt, you've energy to fight this thing. Stay with me, I know you can.
                                                                                      h27cf960bgaa13g4462g92c9gdda1d32e969b | 220b7a4f-5c23-4fef-a4fa-29f42b27814b | stub

                                                                                        70.Narrator: *Your hands are raw and bloody as every inkling of your Urge yearns to tear your bindings.*

                                                                                          226.Player: Rise up, meet its gaze. Show it no fear, and grant it no mercy.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                                          ruletagtype rule
                                                                                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                          Text

                                                                                          Variant 1

                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                          • Wyll
                                                                                          Rise up, meet its gaze. Show it no fear, and grant it no mercy.
                                                                                          h4dfca87bg5ca7g460bgbb5cga48117bc100c | 23ec49c2-cee2-49f3-8cf7-20cb78bd5f9a | stub

                                                                                          Variant 2

                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                          • Karlach
                                                                                          You can do this. I've got you, and I'm not letting you go.
                                                                                          h292bedf6g76a7g44d5g8fd5g53d06b1dcf3e | 0b8ffa0e-c31c-4cb0-884f-50a93f443971 | stub

                                                                                          Variant 3

                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                          • Gale
                                                                                          Steady. You can rein this in - nobody's getting hurt.
                                                                                          hd5dbefacge19ag4ba4g966bgeb04f271b459 | 0dd64e64-84d6-44fb-9203-997bb0ad7ea4 | stub

                                                                                          Variant 4

                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                          • Astarion
                                                                                          Easy now, darling. You've got this. And I've got you.
                                                                                          h55aff2c8ge5a1g4c77g9afdg6ef27610977b | 22b8d50a-b0b0-4261-bd16-dd8b379d7729 | stub

                                                                                          Variant 5

                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                                                          Listen to me. Whatever this lunacy, defy it - or you will answer to my blade.
                                                                                          hc8146140g849dg43cdgaa7egf4ded56c760d | 7e43a86b-e787-4767-adb4-46defe6aadf7 | stub

                                                                                          Variant 6

                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                                                          Easy. You're in control. Bloodlust won't win tonight.
                                                                                          h613b57c9gdd7dg4a5cg9e7cg6b5c0bb74f88 | dc8c02a6-1c0c-4070-a583-24c25b7f2ff9 | stub

                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            26.DU: Your blood will clot for me like liquid rubies.

                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1c31a6ad-7a98-00d9-db4f-340f3b8ee102Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h0889751bg6c87g42b3g89aag7b50523e9a79Text UUID: 486c81fe-48b3-461e-951e-54cb9a94d258Show Once: True
                                                                                            • +
                                                                                              138.Player: You are a champion. If this foe demands blood, then tear off its limbs and let it drink its own!note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                                                              • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                              • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                              • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                              • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                              • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                              • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                              Text

                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Wyll
                                                                                              You are a champion. If this foe demands blood, then tear off its limbs and let it drink its own!
                                                                                              ha3c5574eg4d69g4165gbb75g81e990b05e98 | c379d2c5-2114-43c7-a913-38641b86b9fc | stub

                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Karlach
                                                                                              Bloodlust has made a poet of you.
                                                                                              h54d968c3g97ffg416eg9457g373bd2c7e232 | b6a7132d-9bd1-46e3-83b9-275859b95459 | stub

                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Gale
                                                                                              No, no clotting. I like my blood flowing in my veins, thank you most kindly.
                                                                                              h783659bcg6134g480ag9b5fg1040081d6e7a | 02293d1d-338a-4b6f-bce1-2de6701d37ef | stub

                                                                                              Variant 4

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Astarion
                                                                                              A little late, but good effort. Now just relax, dawn will be here soon.
                                                                                              h3e980815g0c4eg4bb4gaaa4g17b9499b7590 | 08e2b0e6-d3c8-4ed6-809a-ebfa5a13c48f | stub

                                                                                              Variant 5

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                                                              Spill one drop of my blood, and yours will flow like a river. Now get it together!
                                                                                              hfea56671g27a6g473fga809g806b6fca4b12 | ee732377-e3e7-4c9f-b524-ce439f990cc9 | stub

                                                                                              Variant 6

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                                                              Quite an imagination. Try applying it to some peaceful thoughts. I know you can.
                                                                                              heb3e1dccg1720g47b2g895age586457f4d43 | 18454ce5-2d50-475e-bd1b-1031fd09e5cf | stub

                                                                                                63.Narrator: *The night passes sick and sweating, but bloodlessly.*note: The scene fades into the next morningGLO_Camp_Event_SkipSleepCutscene

                                                                                                  207.Narrator: *You once again inhabit your own mind.*

                                                                                                  Metadata

                                                                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e04d7fd1-7aba-1281-9e5f-d714329eddedSpeaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h2456b202g9f9eg4d6agaf9fgaa72976a016dText UUID: aa9bc1ad-a83a-4c01-baf1-fb74832084a8Group ID: 488703c8-3962-fcf8-7ac9-8da8294d2bc2Group Index: 1
                                                                                                  • +
                                                                                                    73.Player: Looks like you're back to your old self. Poor Alfira - if only she'd been so lucky.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more!ORI_DarkUrge_MurderOfAlfira_AlternativeORI_DarkUrge_State_SuspectedAlfiraMurder

                                                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                                                    ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                    • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                    • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                    • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                    • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                    • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                    • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                                                                                    checktype Global
                                                                                                    • ORI_DarkUrge_MurderOfAlfira_Alternative {1904d9ba-7d71-4f02-8c3c-cd57d7e0606d} = False
                                                                                                    • ORI_DarkUrge_State_SuspectedAlfiraMurder {7ef11fbd-70d6-74d7-2679-8d062cd9c3e8} = True

                                                                                                    Text

                                                                                                    Variant 1

                                                                                                    combine=0
                                                                                                    • Wyll
                                                                                                    Looks like you're back to your old self. Poor Alfira - if only she'd been so lucky.
                                                                                                    h82fd1f26g640cg4e3ag81c4gbfb034c3f44d | f4c12439-7eb8-4eff-a25d-fcd16b0c9811 | stub

                                                                                                    Variant 2

                                                                                                    combine=0
                                                                                                    • Karlach
                                                                                                    Here we are, both un-Alfira'd.
                                                                                                    h1a5daad3g3b8dg407bg976cg7dcbe589e3a9 | a6e7d244-2a69-4815-a5b8-8b802dda34de | stub

                                                                                                    Variant 3

                                                                                                    combine=0
                                                                                                    • Gale
                                                                                                    I think I see the madness slipping from your eyes. Looks like I won't be joining Alfira just yet.
                                                                                                    h19d9d82ag2c7eg4f2fga217g8669c1be7b54 | bef9f042-43a5-4a0b-8fcb-ee1b591b5be6 | stub

                                                                                                    Variant 4

                                                                                                    combine=0
                                                                                                    • Astarion
                                                                                                    I felt for the bard, seeing you like that. Poor Alfira never stood a chance, did she?
                                                                                                    h9552c91eg0bf5g492ag842ag6838fa45f307 | e154b091-ec57-4a17-9fe2-6fdb64446db8 | stub

                                                                                                    Variant 5

                                                                                                    combine=0
                                                                                                    • Lae'zel
                                                                                                    Chk. Lucky for us, we're still standing. Can't say the same for Alfira.
                                                                                                    h045e5967gf5c9g4ec7ga258g85d05c2c132c | d5d32426-df31-4416-9f45-c378912d2a17 | stub

                                                                                                    Variant 6

                                                                                                    combine=0
                                                                                                    • Shadowheart
                                                                                                    Are you back to yourself...? Hells, Alfira didn't stand a chance...
                                                                                                    h4ad24306gdd31g4999g8f37g25aef50bf5eb | 98aaec72-c164-4b7f-9da7-91fbf415ce22 | stub

                                                                                                    • +
                                                                                                      39.Player: How are you feeling? Talk to me.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                        67.DU: Confess everything: you have been fiercely fighting against your Dark Urge.

                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4c877b23-0e9c-7282-a6ad-9ff12939a01eSpeaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h0aad44f3g7fecg4e7bgba1bg8d9278575ddbText UUID: c597e6f5-37f6-4680-9db1-c9045a845f2fShow Once: True
                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                          34.Player: Should this inner fiend seek battle again, I'll give it one. Let it taste the edge of the Blade.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                                                          ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                                          Text

                                                                                                          Variant 1

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Wyll
                                                                                                          Should this inner fiend seek battle again, I'll give it one. Let it taste the edge of the Blade.
                                                                                                          h4e0d0fdeg993dg4aadga62bg398c50d2b0f1 | c1d168c6-a180-4463-a305-1abc0be445ce | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 2

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Karlach
                                                                                                          We'll get through this together. I'll protect us. And we'll skip through fate like two truants on the beach at midday.
                                                                                                          h6aadd7b9g31dfg4bdbgb4e1g6a982c91cf94 | 43c97a4b-d700-4e56-8170-707ac76ac7c3 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 3

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Gale
                                                                                                          This is surmountable, I'm sure. I'll protect you until you prevail.
                                                                                                          hbc930600g9088g468agb476g7136ea33926e | 3eb26cb5-794d-4779-b094-e14f31cc34e1 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 4

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Astarion
                                                                                                          You are not alone in this - none of us are. We can even compare notes if you like.
                                                                                                          h43920783g7a28g4d98g9be9ge45c74e0a7d8 | c510b2bb-a84f-4255-9058-7140c7237d3a | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 5

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                                                                          Whenever this Urge strikes next, we will fight it and we will win.
                                                                                                          h6fb0d237g85fcg43bcg9dcfgc98ff13d2e4d | 728be410-44c3-4bfe-ae51-964d26fcd92e | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 6

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                                                                          I'll help protect you, I promise. Seems I'll need to, just to keep myself safe.
                                                                                                          h5e3fbc53g9bacg43ccg93beg875e1573b8c1 | 43613a88-c249-46a7-98fa-840e467716be | stub

                                                                                                            82.DU: You are allowed to hate me for this.

                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5e4351da-b7b3-321c-4bbc-09d1ee1fa627Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h8f80ecc1g6d9ag47e6g9f64g0c8c2575090cText UUID: dee30623-a0a9-4191-beec-7909f33c8fb5Show Once: True
                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              128.Player: Hate you? The coast would sooner be swallowed whole by the Sea of Swords.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                                              ruletagtype rule

                                                                                                              Text

                                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Wyll
                                                                                                              Hate you? The coast would sooner be swallowed whole by the Sea of Swords.
                                                                                                              h5cbbd404g1a0cg4daagb89eg722191e4dd12 | 58746b21-6cab-4297-a3d4-a2de4e3685e2 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Karlach
                                                                                                              Pfft. Hate you? I love the drama. Bring it on.
                                                                                                              ha54494ebge83fg4a86g9206g1ebb660d03f5 | 05d5d3c3-734a-42de-b27f-c3110dac3877 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Gale
                                                                                                              Hate's too easy for my liking. Let's take the high road on this.
                                                                                                              he14a97f8gf809g4e6cgbb96g3325cb8a856c | b5936607-afcc-4553-b7f4-43ecc7ac1f02 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 4

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Astarion
                                                                                                              I don't hate you. Because this is not you.
                                                                                                              h8c6e92d1g03f3g41f0gb829g9fc5b516abf4 | 2dff4eeb-3b68-4fed-aa95-b005a0c894e0 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 5

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                                                                              Hate you? Don't be ridiculous. If I hated you, you'd already be dead.
                                                                                                              h577fe917ge776g43f1gbf1eg2369a0124c5b | a656a73b-e2ae-4a69-bf7d-162dc22b4342 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 6

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                                                                              Let's save the hate for those who deserve it. This isn't your fault.
                                                                                                              h2cbc6ca9ga317g46a3g9a9eg256c1e967d9a | 626b51b3-bd30-4ce4-83aa-ae2829b63dbb | stub

                                                                                                                134.Player: You don't have to shoulder this burden alone.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                                Text

                                                                                                                Variant 1

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Wyll
                                                                                                                You don't have to shoulder this burden alone.
                                                                                                                ha8d27b9egb26bg4ce6ga2ccg41d3ac544258 | 9eebdd9c-a779-4254-bc8f-b4dca1280d2c | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 2

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Karlach
                                                                                                                We'll get through this. Like two roaches in an apocalypse, mind, but still.
                                                                                                                h7fa3f4bege4a0g4764gb4f7g6782a926dd95 | 03afc15d-dc3f-4b89-b259-7db0fdef856a | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 3

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Gale
                                                                                                                Chin up. We'll best this... well, whatever it is.
                                                                                                                hf4cd3d1eg4c97g427fga56dgeb3c4265d99b | c3d3bb03-be93-4a09-8fdf-39953cd5e702 | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 4

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Astarion
                                                                                                                But whatever this is, you will get through it. And I'll be here to make sure you do.
                                                                                                                h2504a2b6gdf76g47b7gadc2g4b7c95af517d | b88c2a10-28cc-48d3-bce6-424aaea9a40f | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 5

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Lae'zel
                                                                                                                Now - a new dawn has come, with new victories to claim.
                                                                                                                ha87e2a8bg7d3ag4ce2g8218gcbe1c908b6d4 | 54d8a59a-4bc1-4218-b944-88bf0ad6a8d2 | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 6

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Shadowheart
                                                                                                                We'll best this - just think positively. Or at least... don't think murderously.
