                                                                                                                • •
                                                                                                                  198.Player: And next time you're in a killing mood, let me know. I'll point you in the right direction. [End]note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                                  Flags and Tags

                                                                                                                  ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                                  • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                                  • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                                  • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                                  • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                                  • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                                  • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                                                  Text

                                                                                                                  Variant 1

                                                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                                                  • Wyll
                                                                                                                  And next time you're in a killing mood, let me know. I'll point you in the right direction.
                                                                                                                  h24502538g1320g4d1egadd4g371d1d5a1226 | 4c5f19df-1e2b-46ee-865d-d18a173e69db | stub

                                                                                                                  Variant 2

                                                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                                                  • Karlach
                                                                                                                  You sure keep me on my toes, don't you? S'why I keep you around.
                                                                                                                  h2bb2ac7cg41f1g4189gad32g0f30d34901d7 | f4974970-ba3d-4de9-9061-664676a0372a | stub

                                                                                                                  Variant 3

                                                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                                                  • Gale
                                                                                                                  At least there's no shortage of enemies out there for you to kill. A veritable feast for the violent-at-heart.
                                                                                                                  hb6859c5cgd877g426dga841g6048b1b95a5c | 64172f0b-3ba8-48ed-9557-be36c3d68622 | stub

                                                                                                                  Variant 4

                                                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                                                  • Astarion
                                                                                                                  Anyway, it's a brand-new day. I'm sure we'll find lots of people for you to kill.
                                                                                                                  h9715b6d2g2d1fg465dg9b0fg83de7a8fc88b | 20fc9f5d-818f-473d-95f4-6f80ea92d577 | stub

                                                                                                                  Variant 5

                                                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                                                  • Lae'zel
                                                                                                                  So let's get to claiming them, before someone else beats us to it.
                                                                                                                  h67f6ec38g4a1ag4504g9417g36b022b25fff | 0b68ba9f-a5e2-4c37-964f-5b40e2603588 | stub

                                                                                                                  Variant 6

                                                                                                                  combine=0
                                                                                                                  • Shadowheart
                                                                                                                  Besides, there's plenty of foes out there for you to vent your impulses on.
                                                                                                                  h4cd75fbcg8011g446agb4aag22410e1767f8 | 07b89bef-ffc7-41bc-aecf-24fe95d5b108 | stub

                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                            228.DU: It's really all right?

                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f9347cf3-3521-080a-23ce-d307a15525f2Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: hc1920588gfb64g4f47ga564g5a5dc70ac859Text UUID: 05a350ce-3eef-4528-8eee-f7b0f414b7a2Show Once: True
                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              141.Player: It is. You are my greatest adventure -note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim

                                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                              • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                              • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                              • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                              • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                              • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                              • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}
                                                                                                              checktype Local
                                                                                                              • 806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim {b85e15cf-011a-04f3-cee6-89a3c85aa623} = True

                                                                                                              Text

                                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Wyll
                                                                                                              It is. You are my greatest adventure -
                                                                                                              h8992931bg96a3g4f50g921ag4e35e1852fc9 | b4c95088-e11b-43d4-947c-e3a521f56b60 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Karlach
                                                                                                              To be honest, the thought of holding you down while you try to rip my throat out is kind of wonderful.
                                                                                                              hfa7d1c7dg32b8g43d0ga620ge7d62d974b2f | 63a681bb-ba98-4c97-b1b1-7b3ce8518750 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Gale
                                                                                                              Let's not throw the murderous baby out with the bathwater - it's not all right, but it's what I'm willing to do. For you.
                                                                                                              h3fe55e2ege22dg42b6g9dcfg752a6350d679 | 3eaa4a3a-ecf0-447a-829d-3f9d15d479cf | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 4

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Astarion
                                                                                                              Well no, you tried to kill me, of course it's not all right.
                                                                                                              hc8f6f045gee9bg4b88gbd28gaff0c0f2a851 | 6958d6d8-0592-4b38-8ae2-ca6d4f8378ce | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 5

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                                                                              Certainly not. But you didn't leave any unwanted bruises last night.
                                                                                                              hcd234f55gc0e6g47c1ga846g8f37c5ea3fb8 | abd5cf72-6897-42b4-93f0-248c15ffddf4 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 6

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                                                                              I won't quite say that - far from it. But you and I have a bond. I can't let a little bloodlust ruin that.
                                                                                                              h45d95934g69eag4e02g80f8gf1223b7b8615 | b82ca0fa-e913-42b8-92b4-c9b97018b7af | stub

                                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                                189.Player: And what is an adventure without monsters to slay, and toasts to be made after?note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim

                                                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                                                ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                                • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                                • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                                • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}

                                                                                                                • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}

                                                                                                                checktype Local
                                                                                                                • 806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim {b85e15cf-011a-04f3-cee6-89a3c85aa623} = True

                                                                                                                Text

                                                                                                                Variant 1

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Wyll
                                                                                                                And what is an adventure without monsters to slay, and toasts to be made after?
                                                                                                                h14c61dc9g4999g44c4g9452gfd0e8946e4fe | b8912566-c0a9-4886-898e-b78da725727e | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 2

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Karlach
                                                                                                                I can take you at your worst. With pleasure.
                                                                                                                hfc2ae8b4gdb76g4789g91d0gb58dfa5b0aa4 | 3ec4a779-a806-453d-92db-18f900a8963d | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 3

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Gale
                                                                                                                This is a rather high-risk romance we've embarked upon, isn't it? Brings new meaning to the term 'strange bedfellows'.
                                                                                                                h3c8b8f01g75bcg4805gace9g31cb69f4257e | a8d95c69-e37e-4bfb-81a9-6039ca86570f | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 4

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Astarion
                                                                                                                But nothing is ruined either. After all, what's a little attempted murder between friends?
                                                                                                                h054d1133gb473g4d9agbde9ga42b48cd87ce | 322f62ab-9e3e-45ce-b904-ebd13d13bb11 | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 5

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Lae'zel
                                                                                                                Consensual bruises? Those can be negotiated.
                                                                                                                h50277b6bg388bg460cgb065g0b4a1f653684 | 5cfb2e96-9743-41bd-bd02-8990f99134fc | stub

                                                                                                                Variant 6

                                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                                • Shadowheart
                                                                                                                I'm sure someone will write a romantic ballad about this one day - hopefully not a tragic one.
                                                                                                                h4c516be4g89c0g4654g9937gc765e80fbe7c | ea2abf15-9e7a-4af9-b9cc-f93e45420b60 | stub

                                                                                                                • See Node 134 (Player) You don't have to shoulder this burden alone.
                                                                                                          • +
                                                                                                            230.DU: I've killed so many people. You should end me here and now.

                                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fae01b65-6174-ea84-4f15-5deb0930bb0cSpeaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h3264f9beg4c84g4716gafd4gfdea094678dcText UUID: b0127698-1538-4889-aae9-eb83ff133cd3Show Once: True
                                                                                                            • +
                                                                                                              209.Player: I trust you. Gods only know if I should - but I do.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                              • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                              • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                              • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                              • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                              • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                              • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                                              Text

                                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Wyll
                                                                                                              I trust you. Gods only know if I should - but I do.
                                                                                                              haa4ce663g626ag4b31gb9e1gc4da1c97fd8b | 0b68f616-fe72-4ca1-bea7-90c2469ca3bf | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Karlach
                                                                                                              I've killed people too. Innocence is for the lucky. Life is dirty, and we've got the stain of it.
                                                                                                              h52f9a162gd95ag4795g9f84g1960ce6f7a2e | 517a0e4b-0a77-48b9-82d3-d9deeecb15d9 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Gale
                                                                                                              That's capitulation, not a solution. Let's search for less drastic means.
                                                                                                              h6a24cf7bgc4a6g4fc1ga4e2g248ad8909ef5 | 9fa07be4-a117-4412-ae8d-d7a078c2240d | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 4

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Astarion
                                                                                                              Oh please, how many lives have you taken? Dozens? I must have brought Cazador a thousand souls.
                                                                                                              h2fc63c58g8f49g46d8g87dega152f3510336 | 5fb590db-d902-4e9b-b680-f62619c9d966 | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 5

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                                                                              That's one solution. Someone else, I'd consider it. But you're not someone else, so we'll have to find another.
                                                                                                              h01a34310g8a27g4becg9a74g1470faee6278 | 234998f9-d686-47d2-a43e-6f6b2babe2ca | stub

                                                                                                              Variant 6

                                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                                                                              Well, it's always an option if we're out of ideas... but let's at least try to save you before it comes to that, hmm?
                                                                                                              h2550c8dcg2381g4e9agbc8eg75269bcc5415 | 5f86512a-8371-4389-b9d0-3d50bb100409 | stub

                                                                                                              • See Node 134 (Player) You don't have to shoulder this burden alone.
                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                        105.DU: Tell the story, but lay heavy blame on the Butler.

                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 75eb1638-a4d1-4b97-cb82-292238dc0812Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: hdd54b70cg81c8g4c5bgb73egd16820ce162cText UUID: c4234a0d-4ad2-4306-b71d-c3f506faf8ceShow Once: True
                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                          107.Player: That blasted thing better hope I don't catch it. I'll slice it in two, fancy hat and all.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                                                          ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                                          Text

                                                                                                          Variant 1

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Wyll
                                                                                                          That blasted thing better hope I don't catch it. I'll slice it in two, fancy hat and all.
                                                                                                          hfcdb83c6g20abg4af3gb82ega660f28baf69 | 6226b044-fbaf-421e-a80e-20378990b5f1 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 2

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Karlach
                                                                                                          I'll fuck him up. Bad. Just say the word next time he slithers into our camp, and he's gone.
                                                                                                          h8713841ege8afg4c25g85f7g9b7ab8010b36 | a79da276-da16-431d-8692-37c0e959beb7 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 3

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Gale
                                                                                                          A most dire night-visitor to be burdened with, sounds like. My sympathies.
                                                                                                          h3358fed7g8167g4f07g9f46g6dda424761cb | f23ba09b-10c3-4825-a9bb-8efea59d73d1 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 4

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Astarion
                                                                                                          The little shit. And here I hoped I was your only night-time visitor.
                                                                                                          haf51382fg84d2g4f90g945cge84c0c6859d6 | 8e3412b1-3f83-4e67-b444-20997bdfcb64 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 5

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                                                                          Damnable vermin. I will not let you be preyed upon by this - this louse.
                                                                                                          h19bf089bg243bg4bccg9881gd75c46d1ee1f | de4b1a6a-30f1-4300-86ff-3a12bca9af9a | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 6

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                                                                          Gruesome-sounding wretch - not something I envy of you.
                                                                                                          h8cfbcda7g513bg4918gbae3g7be3cc7243de | 4544da6a-e3c9-4e22-9334-80b7417eecb9 | stub

                                                                                                          • See Node 34 (Player) Should this inner fiend seek battle again, I'll give it one. Let it taste the edge of the Blade.
                                                                                                      • +
                                                                                                        78.DU: Recount your Urges, holding your past life responsible.

                                                                                                        Metadata

                                                                                                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5883da61-8ed2-6c0c-e8d9-54e7aadfef06Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: hf3186303gd46eg4e6cg98f4g3db5c5e0fdfaText UUID: aa236bf9-67e5-4849-a1c7-776de82b21e3Show Once: True
                                                                                                        • +
                                                                                                          148.Player: You are not the before. You are the now, you are the later. If your past is so diseased, let it wither and plant something new.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                                                          ruletagtype rule
                                                                                                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                                                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                                                          Text

                                                                                                          Variant 1

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Wyll
                                                                                                          You are not the before. You are the now, you are the later. If your past is so diseased, let it wither and plant something new.
                                                                                                          hcfaed499g0adeg4a6dgb45eg5e15bb1a53a1 | 8aab5a14-6c2d-4cf9-8881-847b0d0763d1 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 2

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Karlach
                                                                                                          It's bad. I won't say it isn't. But... I've done worse. Powers beyond our control picked us to do their dirty work - that isn't our fault.
                                                                                                          h5052d6a1g99d0g4e97ga8a6g924486421269 | 8832d8fa-dfb3-4335-b684-08d0429797f0 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 3

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Gale
                                                                                                          Few have an unblemished history. You must better yourself, not condemn yourself.
                                                                                                          h40f5a64ag76b1g4644gb365g4c259726c971 | 034eca42-bfcc-4fd3-8224-c58d86942b78 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 4

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Astarion
                                                                                                          If anyone understands an internal voice forcing your hand, I do. But that's not who we are now. We make our own choices, and you made the right one last night.
                                                                                                          hf0a185d1g842eg4f61gbe90g03bae5d4d2a1 | 49b814cb-8629-4dbf-b4b8-95830939386b | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 5

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                                                                          You craved for blood. There needn't be shame in that. You may even carry a grain of pride.
                                                                                                          h4698a726g734ag4d7bgb4f4g03b43e1c3a20 | 37df30c8-bf68-4cff-bb2b-45dd85d4edc4 | stub

                                                                                                          Variant 6

                                                                                                          combine=0
                                                                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                                                                          That person's a stranger to me. Don't torment yourself with the past.
                                                                                                          hd205d90ege732g4dbdg9edcg3e5a39f48ff6 | 0e2394ba-eee4-45ee-93ff-dc965f5f6833 | stub

                                                                                            201.DU: The bruises I will give you shall gorge themselves on your blood.

                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d6aa5260-0e68-da19-cc56-500b79090baaSpeaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: he39c91e6g11aag4738gba8dg468a072339beText UUID: d20e4db3-d0d3-43e5-873a-5982edf0c9dfShow Once: True
                                                                                            • +
                                                                                              87.Player: The fiend strikes. Punish it, warrior. It's come for the slaughter!note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                                                              ruletagtype rule
                                                                                              • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                                              • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                                              • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                                              • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                                              • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}

                                                                                              Text

                                                                                              Variant 1

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Wyll
                                                                                              The fiend strikes. Punish it, warrior. It's come for the slaughter!
                                                                                              h98d8291agc620g4d2egaccbgc3801e067103 | 498941ca-846b-4561-930d-5ceb266ef92d | stub

                                                                                              Variant 2

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Karlach
                                                                                              Ah, soldier, what are you even on about?
                                                                                              hc1f03bceg184eg4a06gb5b0gaa1e8ced997b | 7b81a9ac-a051-4f02-b159-749f3de263a4 | stub

                                                                                              Variant 3

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Gale
                                                                                              There will be no gorging of any sort until breakfast - understood? Stay with me.
                                                                                              h8197f497g6f1eg454agb427gc3f8e6a1d72b | ee9e5182-c3b5-48ef-846c-b8048aa2f10b | stub

                                                                                              Variant 4

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Astarion
                                                                                              Of course they will, dear. Now just relax, dawn will be here soon.
                                                                                              h6999359cg15ecg43b6gbf8fg138949312b5b | 2b2fb8a8-29d2-43e5-8cb3-8828114c6d43 | stub

                                                                                              Variant 5

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                                                              Kainyank. You will lay no hand on me tonight.
                                                                                              h26e9eb32g6ddfg4cf4gbf73gaf7e48190192 | 4b39e7b6-42b6-4910-8b56-1f5edeceb273 | stub

                                                                                              Variant 6

                                                                                              combine=0
                                                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                                                              Whatever's whispering these rabid thoughts to you - block it out. Focus on me.
                                                                                              h6f6d760bg8875g4e33gb9c9ga954a3e42c76 | f64a8e33-5f0d-4258-9948-75219b93d5cc | stub

                                                                                              • See Node 63 (Narrator) *The night passes sick and sweating, but bloodlessly.*
                                                                                          • +
                                                                                            160.DU: Growl.

                                                                                            Metadata

                                                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: adcf7f31-a63c-66a8-1658-3bca6c83ca2dSpeaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: hf290e87bg2dafg4571g94a8g8e2ba950f36cText UUID: 0444d959-8678-4956-bab9-426fb9b35e21Show Once: True
                                                                                            • +
                                                                                              161.Player: That's it. Gather your might, slaughter the fiend that stalks you!note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                              Node Type: RollResultUUID: 23ecca31-f0c9-d413-95c0-c9abf937e330Success: True
                                                                                              • +
                                                                                                120.Player: The fiend's slain. As if I could ever have doubted you. Now rest - you've earned it.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                                                Flags and Tags

                                                                                                ruletagtype rule

                                                                                                • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}

                                                                                                Text

                                                                                                Variant 1

                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                • Wyll
                                                                                                The fiend's slain. As if I could ever have doubted you. Now rest - you've earned it.
                                                                                                h08161691g1415g4fc4g8c27g3516e0b44c62 | f90ab737-95b7-48a8-9a17-d38d8de6f61d | stub

                                                                                                Variant 2

                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                • Karlach
                                                                                                Thank me when we've both survived the night.
                                                                                                heb4d97d9gd09dg44ffgaf34g5d566fe2dcb0 | 87f4d552-d17a-4c99-acc0-1f94eae9abf4 | stub

                                                                                                Variant 3

                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                • Gale
                                                                                                Gratitude can wait - you're not out of the woods yet. Stay focused.
                                                                                                hab311ac3gcc0ag44f8ga6ffg8ed3e3980b4b | 1dfb2af0-49fb-47e4-906d-f663c2bbfb86 | stub

                                                                                                Variant 4

                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                • Astarion
                                                                                                You'd do the same to me. Now just relax - dawn isn't far off.
                                                                                                had39343dg4edfg45dfg97bfga517da6bc3ea | 3f5132a6-14aa-478f-be64-f56b23500f98 | stub

                                                                                                Variant 5

                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                • Lae'zel
                                                                                                I don't need thanks - I need answers. For now, rest. We'll speak come dawn.
                                                                                                h2b7c5cf8gcdcbg443cg944eg2be9fc5c0b8a | 35c74616-d17b-4b14-bd1c-bf3e9abd8147 | stub

                                                                                                Variant 6

                                                                                                combine=0
                                                                                                • Shadowheart
                                                                                                You can thank me once the bloodlust subsides. Keep focused.
                                                                                                h5a8f52b6g24bbg48e6g8b42g334c859ce592 | c2f2cd45-7cb6-44d8-87cd-4f87bdb65d80 | stub

                                                                                      109.Player: Shit. This isn't good.note: [greg] companion is sitting near the player as they are going through withdrawl, sitting position is differerent than when they just had woke. Its not a relaxed moment, establish a pose that refects that. companion avoid the player trying to bite themWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel is on the Orpheus path.+2 more

                                                                                      • Wyll
                                                                                      Shit. This isn't good.

                                                                                      Variant 2

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Karlach
                                                                                      Easy, now - a piece of me will burn you going in and out.

                                                                                      Variant 3

                                                                                      combine=0
                                                                                      • Gale

                                                                                      • Lae'zel is on the Orpheus path.

                                                                                          Node Type: JumpUUID: b554d1a2-34ac-5d0f-3844-ef1b9b62c6aeJump Target: Node 186 (c6317dc7-7d17-2d18-e092-1585d4b158ee)Jump Target Point: 2
                                                                        • +
                                                                          54.Player: Maybe we still can. There's yet to be a storm we couldn't weather.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                          Flags and Tags

                                                                          ruletagtype rule
                                                                          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                          • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                          • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                          • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                          Text

                                                                          Variant 1

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Wyll
                                                                          Maybe we still can. There's yet to be a storm we couldn't weather.
                                                                          ha06da34cga3ceg4449ga5a6g56d75120f2cb | 47495f61-9818-4a65-ae6e-3340779f5cf0 | stub

                                                                          Variant 2

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Karlach
                                                                          That's what we do. We help each other. Right?
                                                                          hf650fed4g9ea4g4a8fg8175ga48860f1c94d | d411c921-cd29-4c0b-9cbd-55bc2a62c20a | stub

                                                                          Variant 3

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Gale
                                                                          What is it? A curse? Compulsion? Enthrallment? Whatever it is, we're going to free you of it.
                                                                          h3eec8c20gbd76g4263g9875gad53d7c6892e | 3690685e-73dd-4ea9-9d0e-b045ae69b8c7 | stub

                                                                          Variant 4

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Astarion
                                                                          Whatever it is that's controlling you, we can fight it. I know that better than anyone.
                                                                          hfc38abbdg559cg4b43gb768g9ed17cf23b95 | 4b039405-2488-422d-b5e5-099414a7af42 | stub

                                                                          Variant 5

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Lae'zel
                                                                          We have too many battles before us. I will not have you falling to bloody madness.
                                                                          hfccece3fg7971g449fg92ddg527ef6731588 | a81b2726-9a92-4e0f-b561-554e23147222 | stub

                                                                          Variant 6

                                                                          combine=0
                                                                          • Shadowheart
                                                                          Seems like some sort of curse - the last bloody thing we need. But we're going to help you through this, together.
                                                                          hde2ef4f0g61ffg4ca2g8daaga0257016fd6d | 2d73fe4b-9c97-465d-aad1-864d462bacab | stub

                                                                          • See Node 76 (Narrator) *Suddenly you become drowsy. Your vision blurs and floods with yellow bile, and you faint in a dizzy blur.*
                                                                • +
                                                                  18.DU: Madness will take over my body against my will, and I will kill you.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 10510901-3abd-45c5-f7bd-433897f6912bSpeaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h6ab8b2a3gb297g4b94gb0e7gb979d1662856Text UUID: 5a3435a9-2c4c-41a1-be13-4db02d7668edShow Once: True
                                                                  • See Node 197 (Player) You wouldn't - you couldn't. Could you?
                                                                • +
                                                                  140.DU: I've been cursed. When I fall asleep, I will try to murder you.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 99d5bb5c-06e5-5740-b13c-458eec0f8da0Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h59fbb48dga7f4g4c81gbb4ag5d139cea8923Text UUID: e2ada4ac-dad9-4dfd-87c6-85b12034c427Show Once: True
                                                                  • +

                                                                    • See Node 77 (Player) You should've told me sooner. We could've figured something out.
                                                                • +
                                                                  49.DU: I'm going to kill the person I care most about: you. Unless you can stop me.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3cff3183-5127-d53e-3f27-fd35847f4ab4Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h654adb65gfaabg4aa2gaeadg6c9114c5da83Text UUID: 3c2a02e3-ccce-4b66-ac2d-ed93fb646c45Show Once: True
                                                                  • +
                                                                    180.Player: Madness - or a curse, perhaps? There must be some cure, some potion for you to take.note: [Greg] .Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                    ruletagtype rule
                                                                    • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                    • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                    • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                    • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                    • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                    • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                    Text

                                                                    Variant 1

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Wyll
                                                                    Madness - or a curse, perhaps? There must be some cure, some potion for you to take.
                                                                    he2833bdfgd362g44e2g826ag8b9894a6bae2 | 9a7627a2-5874-4df4-b9bb-a19fbf3b13a4 | stub

                                                                    Variant 2

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Karlach
                                                                    That's so sweet. And fucked up. As for whether I can stop you, I wouldn't worry about that.
                                                                    hc0c6fce9gf599g4abcga62dg4de43dc2d947 | de7a8047-ec88-4127-bff7-4378c45cd72a | stub

                                                                    Variant 3

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Gale
                                                                    I... see? Sweet that you care enough to murder me. Mind if you don't?
                                                                    he35787c8g8340g4e67g8147g0b973d8c4a0d | 9f14f1f0-659d-45c2-9523-5e92cdf82702 | stub

                                                                    Variant 4

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Astarion
                                                                    How flattering. And disturbing.
                                                                    h7d13ae2egc957g417ag999bg63b81e4e8c01 | bc665f88-d634-4208-b3f8-71ade391c9dc | stub

                                                                    Variant 5

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Lae'zel
                                                                    Nonsense. Bloodshed is for battle, and flattery for the triumph after.
                                                                    h7e8a66d2g1c7cg4cf3ga52dg8d1f946d3b3d | 0c065812-8363-44c8-80b9-65233772039a | stub

                                                                    Variant 6

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Shadowheart
                                                                    I suppose I'm flattered - and alarmed.
                                                                    hbf7e47beg2b70g4dc1g88dbgba838b52aed0 | 0807ef6d-a7b4-46ab-9959-19fab0d6feac | stub

                                                                    • See Node 77 (Player) You should've told me sooner. We could've figured something out.
                                                                • +
                                                                  172.DU: Oh... sorry. I just had a bad dream. Go back to sleep.

                                                                  Metadata

                                                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bbf344f5-c336-f2ca-3d5b-915b98fa8466Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h8344806fg87e3g4612g9d83g7e6c521d2a1aText UUID: 60b671ab-05cb-49ee-88d1-1fb4c1396b06Show Once: True
                                                                  • +
                                                                    38.Player: Glad you're all right. Get some rest, and may only the sweetest spirits haunt your dreams.WyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                                    Flags and Tags

                                                                    ruletagtype rule
                                                                    • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
                                                                    • Karlach {1a2f70d6-8ead-4eb5-a824-79ee1971764a}
                                                                    • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                                    • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}
                                                                    • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5}
                                                                    • Shadowheart {642d2aee-e3df-47e3-9f47-bbcd441bb9e0}

                                                                    Text

                                                                    Variant 1

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Wyll
                                                                    Glad you're all right. Get some rest, and may only the sweetest spirits haunt your dreams.
                                                                    h742fa502gffbag4812g95e7g368b4a6052a2 | 513cd905-8b6d-4aa2-9944-0801b7e97493 | stub

                                                                    Variant 2

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Karlach
                                                                    Must've been a doozy. Look after yourself, all right? And wake me up again if you can't sleep.
                                                                    hc2cf4a76g18b1g448fg889fg9eee9b0c138d | 1d8ee378-ec00-4722-85cd-dd4b32ff7f54 | stub

                                                                    Variant 3

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Gale
                                                                    Hmm. All right, then. Hopefully there's no more interludes before daybreak.
                                                                    h1040ac39g3338g4926ga69eg0764c3338aae | 57ce5942-24db-408d-97da-0a35d093c128 | stub

                                                                    Variant 4

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Astarion
                                                                    All right, if you're sure. We can always talk about it in the morning.
                                                                    haedce0c8gd1bfg4072gb5b9g54185f8ebf4e | 58e34e00-af93-42d6-8ab3-b852637807d6 | stub

                                                                    Variant 5

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Lae'zel
                                                                    Fine. Good night, then.
                                                                    h879ac8b6g1552g48b8gaa8cg2612becbb3d9 | 5d56a374-60bc-408e-bed5-0a49d079bef3 | stub

                                                                    Variant 6

                                                                    combine=0
                                                                    • Shadowheart
                                                                    All right, then... Maybe if it happens again, try pinching yourself.
                                                                    h4cb27224g8ac6g4166gb94dg9fa549e786fc | 2dbe1164-6d28-448a-861c-d516bed8e3d2 | stub

                                                                      135.Narrator: *You return to your bedroll, and sleep like the dead.*note: Fade to black, companion will be dead the next morning.

                                                                      Metadata

                                                            163.DU: You are in a lot of danger. We need to act fast.

                                                            Metadata

                                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: af9ef819-2ffc-9383-817e-8023c9572be9Speaker: 2 (DU)Text Handle: h640e32e6g82a9g4f63gaa7dg9dd3b615c56aText UUID: fb78d4f6-e2ed-470e-93eb-e708491962a7Show Once: True
                                                            • +
                                                              72.Player: You've got my attention.note: [Greg] DU has a woozy expression.Companion should be in the sitting up pose after wakingWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more

                                                              Flags and Tags

                                                              ruletagtype rule

                                                              Text

                                                              Variant 1

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Wyll
                                                              You've got my attention.
                                                              h29d4c36cgea64g4beag987dge72a0f5f1348 | 455cbf5a-c7d5-4c96-bfaa-770e0fffc9f2 | stub

                                                              Variant 2

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Karlach
                                                              Tell me what to do, and it's done.
                                                              h4f1caae3ge30bg4487gb651g25ebd7c6fcfd | 0ce9f8aa-e324-4ac9-b1e9-bd3ee5ba8524 | stub

                                                              Variant 3

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Gale
                                                              I see... fast as in right now, I assume, rather than 'first light after some sleep' fast? You'd better tell me all.
                                                              he899b044g7fc1g4a2egab85gab2486f5a2f9 | 92d385bc-b937-458a-841e-58450547d9d2 | stub

                                                              Variant 4

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Astarion
                                                              All right, talk quickly, then.
                                                              h790047f9g0823g4390gb60bg09a95ae865a9 | 658d4009-215f-4335-a501-4e65f39e1f32 | stub

                                                              Variant 5

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Lae'zel
                                                              Point me the way, and I will scrape my enemy's skin from its body.
                                                              h2369c1e8gc70bg4859gbdaeg96e324829533 | 9fe88a5d-0557-4683-8ebb-04f524ed41cf | stub

                                                              Variant 6

                                                              combine=0
                                                              • Shadowheart
                                                              All right, I'm awake. Tell me everything.

                                                              • See Node 106 (Narrator) *As you tell your story, fatigue fills your body. Your head swims with the worst headache you've known.*
                                                      • +
                                                        215.Player: What in the - oh!note: [greg] The Companion awakens from their sleep.Choose an appropraite start sleeping position for character, sit up during lineWyllKarlachGaleAstarionLae'zel+1 more!806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim

                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                        ruletagtype rule

                                                        • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
                                                        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3}

                                                        checktype Local
                                                        • 806a4bc3-5227-e9eb-8dbf-ffe2ba9dbc4c_IsInRomanceWithVictim {b85e15cf-011a-04f3-cee6-89a3c85aa623} = False

                                                        Text

                                                        Variant 1

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Wyll
                                                        What in the - oh!
                                                        h8c0144c0g8059g4a08ga26dg1e632b9b346a | 7857e42a-ba3a-4e46-8ecc-7a58c9746899 | stub

                                                        Variant 2

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Karlach
                                                        Whoa - everything all right, soldier?
                                                        hb6afd474g61ebg464bga7b3g881e548e85a5 | 78559cad-c53c-4036-89cf-ff3f4950f326 | stub

                                                        Variant 3

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Gale
                                                        Mmm... mmmph? Ah! What're you...? This is a truly disgusting hour to seek a chin-wag, you know.
                                                        h05729fddgdd9ag44e5g8aa0ge23301f2e636 | 1b06f923-c79b-4279-9723-80a79d6cb3cd | stub

                                                        Variant 4

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Astarion
                                                        Please tell me this is important. You need my beauty sleep.
                                                        h5532d272g4fa7g4d63g9e42gdc6981ae0dc2 | c7bb69ba-97f9-4c07-81ba-0af01fde2afe | stub

                                                        Variant 5

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Lae'zel
                                                        Tsk'va. Don't wake a sleeping warrior without expecting a blade through your belly.
                                                        h0a102453g00e9g4ffcg80d3gd397cdad93cf | e7719fca-e1dd-4cd4-8c9c-5c3cfba11e49 | stub

                                                        Variant 6

                                                        combine=0
                                                        • Shadowheart
                                                        What the...? Hells, don't wake me like that. I was almost reaching for a weapon.
                                                        h2da65bc6g8260g4f50g9ddfg7f5287563e3d | 63ba6250-69e8-4002-ae81-935c6f9f83fd | stub

                                  210.SoundsLikeDUButler: Your inheritance of your estate depends on you maintaining a healthy stream of kills.!ORI_DarkUrge_Knows_KillIsobel

                                  checktype Global

      102.SoundsLikeDUButler: I wish I'd discovered you drinking yourself to death in a tavern with some bedfellows of negotiable virtue, and not this debacle.

      Metadata

          126.DU: What in the hells do you mean you're my Butler?

          Metadata

            193.SoundsLikeDUButler: I also tend to your grounds, manage your estate, arrange murder victims for you to systematically brutalise, and serve dinner.

            Metadata
